Tests the `Math.ceil` function with a negative decimal input in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test case that uses an assertion to verify the behavior of the `Math.ceil` function in JavaScript. The assertion checks that calling `Math.ceil` with the argument `-1.3` returns `-1`. This test ensures that the `Math.ceil` function correctly rounds a negative decimal number up to the nearest integer. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on validating the output of a single mathematical operation.
